problem: Critical characters in a third-party database front end are currently bright light blue and need stronger visual focus.

recommended_replacements.name: navy_on_light_background
recommended_replacements.use_when: The application background is white or light and blue still carries useful meaning.

recommended_replacements.name: black_on_light_background
recommended_replacements.use_when: Maximum readability is more important than preserving a blue semantic meaning.

recommended_replacements.name: warm_yellow_on_dark_background
recommended_replacements.use_when: The application background is dark and the critical characters need strong emphasis.

recommended_replacements.name: white_on_dark_background
recommended_replacements.use_when: The application background is dark and yellow conflicts with warning or status colors.
